title: Patricia's Green In Hayes Valley, 499 Octavia St, San Francisco, CA 94102, US - MapQuest
content: # Patricia's Green In Hayes Valley. Patricia's Green is a pocket park located at the intersection of Octavia Boulevard and Fell Street in San Francisco. This urban space features manicured lawns, a children's play structure, and community benches, serving as a gathering place for locals and visitors in the Hayes Valley neighborhood. Patricia's Green is also adjacent to the PROXY Project, an open-air neighborhood space with food vendors and community events. Patricia's Green is a symbol of the city making the correct decisions after the removal of the Central Freeway Octavia off-ramp, which cast a literal dark shadow... Great chill spot in the day - many folks bring their dogs - the grass area has lots of dog poop so nobody really picnics on it, but there are plenty benches to enjoy a seat outside and grab... Nice little neighborhood park in Hayes Valley. But there's a playground, some green for the dogs, and seating to... Free Things to Do in San Francisco, CA.

title: San Francisco’s Best Public Space Came From A Removed Freeway | The Plaza Perspective
content: *Welcome to the **Let’s Explore** series, where we explore a notable place from an urban design perspective, seeing how its layout and design influences the experience of being there.*. Patricia’s Green is a public space in San Francisco’s Hayes Valley neighborhood, close to downtown. Over those hours, I’ve noticed how much the park’s excellent design make this a superb spot to sit, stroll, play, and socialize. In today’s *Let’s Explore*, we’ll walk around Patricia’s Green and see what makes it a great public space…. Standing next to the central installation (1) (the wooden temple in these photos has since been removed), we look north toward the circular seating area (2) and south toward the children’s play area (3). In addition to the lack of a wall along the park’s eastern edge (see part B above), the side street (6) (left photo) on the east (and west) side and the nearby Linden Alley (7) (right photo) are narrow, just 20 feet wide.

title: Patricia's Green San Francisco - Hayes Valley park and art
content: Visitors write notes to those who have passed on, or people jot down fleeting thoughts. The park is a beautiful centerpiece to this growing neighborhood.
